calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition To Identify Heirs
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Off Calendar

PETITION Petition To Identify Heirs
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Continued To Sep-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Basin for Paul Horn (Executor for the Estate of Bertha Wyrsch). Richard Sax for Rose Oliver and Murry Richardson. Herman Wyrsch in Propria Persona. Thomas Fogarty in Propria Persona. Matthew Fogarty also present.

Mr. Sax stated that the civil action case number 480854 had a trial date of August 30, 2010, that the issue was whether the Heirs of Lena Wyrsch would take under the deed, that they were asking for a determination of her Heirs and that this action may need to be consolidated with the civil matter. The Court suggested filing a Motion to Consolidate this action into the civil action in the Law and Motion Department and directed Counsel to provide notice to the Heirs of Lena. Mr. Sax stated that he would file the motion within one week. The matter was continued to September 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung and Deputy Neu.
